message.content:
Search for how Baileys (the @whiskeysockets/baileys library) supports sending "typing" or "composing" presence indicators.

1. Check in node_modules/@whiskeysockets/baileys for presence-related functions. Search for "presenceSubscribe", "sendPresenceUpdate", "composing", "paused", "typing" in the type definitions or source.

2. Also check if the existing handler.js at C:\Users\johnm\teacher-gradebot\src\whatsapp\handler.js already uses any presence APIs.

3. Find the exact API signature needed to send a "composing" (typing) indicator to a specific chat JID via the Baileys socket.

Look in:
- C:\Users\johnm\teacher-gradebot\node_modules\@whiskeysockets\baileys\lib\
- Any .d.ts type definition files for the socket type

I need to know: what method to call on the socket, what arguments it takes, and how to stop the typing indicator.
